title: Poolside Amenity Unit — STASH, CHARGE, CHILL, ORDER | LounGenie
excerpt: Discover the LounGenie poolside amenity unit: waterproof safe, solar USB charging, removable ice bucket, and QR/service ordering — designed for hospitality.
content:
Explore Every LounGenie Feature

LounGenie combines secure storage, solar charging, cooling, and ordering into one weather-rated, modular unit that scales from 10 to 500+ seats.

STASH — Waterproof Safe

Commercial-grade waterproof safe and keypad so guests can securely store phones, keys, and wallets — increasing dwell time and trust.

CHARGE — Solar-Powered USB

Solar panels power USB charging ports at the seat; no trenching, no permits, minimal maintenance.

CHILL — Removable Ice Bucket

Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours, encouraging repeat orders and higher spend per guest.

ORDER — QR Ordering & Service Call

Service+ includes a staff call button; 2.0 adds QR ordering that prints on a dedicated PoolSafe printer — no POS integration required.

Watch Demo See Installations
